Price guarantee close. Hey, since price is your only concern, I'd like to offer you a price promise guarantee, which is that if you were to leave here with our product and then later find a better price on the same product, we will match that price or beat it. This is our way of giving you the assurance that you are getting the best price and you can make a decision now and do business with me. Since I only have now resolved your concern, I need your approval here, here, and here.
